sourcesContent:
const certificatesData = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: '李明',
    course: '商业管理硕士 (MBA)',
    english_course: 'Master of Business Administration',
    date: '2023-06-15',
    certificateId: 'SIU-MBA-2023-001',
    image: '/images/certificates/mba-certificate.svg',
    description: '为期两年的全球商业领导力课程，专注于战略管理、财务分析和国际商务。',
    english_description:
      'A 2-year program cultivating leadership in global markets with strategic management focus.',
    department: 'School of Business',
    signatories: {
      dean: 'Prof. Robert Chen',
      deanTitle: 'Dean, School of Business',
      president: 'Dr. Elizabeth Stratford',
      presidentTitle: 'University President'
    },
    accreditation: 'AACSB, EQUIS, AMBA',
    verificationUrl: 'verify.stratford-university.edu/MBA/SIU-MBA-2023-001'
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: '张伟',
    course: '人工智能与数据科学',
    english_course: 'Artificial Intelligence & Data Science',
    date: '2023-07-20',
    certificateId: 'SIU-AI-2023-042',
    image: '/images/certificates/ai-certificate.svg',
    description: '为期18个月的专业课程，涵盖机器学习、深度学习和大数据分析技术。',
    english_description:
      '18-month intensive program mastering machine learning, deep learning, and data analytics.',
    department: 'School of Computing',
    signatories: {
      dean: 'Dr. Alan Turing',
      deanTitle: 'Dean, School of Computing',
      president: 'Dr. Elizabeth Stratford',
      presidentTitle: 'University President'
    },
    accreditation: 'ACM, IEEE',
    verificationUrl: 'verify.stratford-university.edu/AI/SIU-AI-2023-042'
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: '王芳',
    course: '全球卫生与医疗管理',
    english_course: 'Global Health & Healthcare Management',
    date: '2023-05-10',
    certificateId: 'SIU-GH-2023-019',
    image: '/images/certificates/health-certificate.svg',
    description: '为期24个月的课程，培养医疗领域领导者，专注全球卫生政策和医疗系统优化。',
    english_description:
      '24-month program for health sector leaders focusing on global health policies.',
    department: 'School of Health Sciences',
    signatories: {
      dean: 'Dr. Maria Johnson',
      deanTitle: 'Dean, School of Health Sciences',
      president: 'Dr. Elizabeth Stratford',
      presidentTitle: 'University President'
    },
    accreditation: 'WHO Collaborative Center, APHEA',
    verificationUrl: 'verify.stratford-university.edu/GH/SIU-GH-2023-019'
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: '赵强',
    course: '国际金融与投资',
    english_course: 'International Finance & Investment',
    date: '2023-08-25',
    certificateId: 'SIU-FIN-2023-007',
    image: '/images/certificates/mba-certificate.svg',
    description: '为期20个月的金融专业课程，涵盖投资策略、风险管理和国际金融市场分析。',
    english_description:
      '20-month finance program covering investment strategies and global market analysis.',
    department: 'School of Business',
    signatories: {
      dean: 'Prof. Robert Chen',
      deanTitle: 'Dean, School of Business',
      president: 'Dr. Elizabeth Stratford',
      presidentTitle: 'University President'
    },
    accreditation: 'CFA Institute Partner, GARP',
    verificationUrl: 'verify.stratford-university.edu/FIN/SIU-FIN-2023-007'
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: '刘洋',
    course: '可持续发展与环境管理',
    english_course: 'Sustainable Development & Environmental Management',
    date: '2023-04-30',
    certificateId: 'SIU-ENV-2023-015',
    image: '/images/certificates/health-certificate.svg',
    description: '为期22个月的环境管理课程，专注可持续发展政策、生态系统保护和气候变化应对。',
    english_description:
      '22-month program specializing in sustainability policies and climate change solutions.',
    department: 'School of Environmental Sciences',
    signatories: {
      dean: 'Dr. David Green',
      deanTitle: 'Dean, Environmental Sciences',
      president: 'Dr. Elizabeth Stratford',
      presidentTitle: 'University President'
    },
    accreditation: 'UNEP Partner Institution, IEMA',
    verificationUrl: 'verify.stratford-university.edu/ENV/SIU-ENV-2023-015'
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: '陈红',
    course: '跨文化交流与全球公民',
    english_course: 'Cross-Cultural Communication & Global Citizenship',
    date: '2023-09-12',
    certificateId: 'SIU-CC-2023-029',
    image: '/images/certificates/ai-certificate.svg',
    description: '为期18个月的国际交流课程，培养全球视野和跨文化沟通能力的未来领导者。',
    english_description:
      '18-month program developing future leaders with global vision and cross-cultural skills.',
    department: 'School of Liberal Arts',
    signatories: {
      dean: 'Prof. Sarah Miller',
      deanTitle: 'Dean, School of Liberal Arts',
      president: 'Dr. Elizabeth Stratford',
      presidentTitle: 'University President'
    },
    accreditation: 'UNESCO Associated Institution, IAICS',
    verificationUrl: 'verify.stratford-university.edu/CC/SIU-CC-2023-029'
  },
];

export default certificatesData;
